otherNightReminder: If they die, they gain a Townsfolk ability. They learn it & might use it tonight.
name: Immortalized
ability: If you die at night, you gain a Townsfolk ability (you learn it), you keep this ability, even if dead.
flavor: Those with a legacy larger than their life are the only that are truly successful.

name: Pathologist
ability: Each night*, choose a player: if they die tonight, learn which character killed them.
flavor: Eyewitness account report that the victim died while in the middle of rolling dies; perhaps due to a stress-induced cardiac arrest. Interesting, there is a scratch mark on the victim's wrist and almost untraceable slow-acting poison in their system. It'd seem our gambler die not of bad gambling skills but of demonic poison!
otherNightReminder: They choose a player. If that player dies, tell the Pathologist which character killed the chosen player.

firstNightReminder: Tell the Hypochondriac their Townsfolk ability. Run their ability accordingly.
name: Hypochondriac
ability: You have a Townsfolk ability. You are mad you have false information or you might be executed.

name: Lolth
ability: Each night*, choose a player: they die. [-X Minions, X+1 Townsfolk are Evil]
flavor: Kill for me. Die for me. You just might earn my favour...
